## One thing to fix tomorrow
**Stale data reliance**: All inputs (today-bias.json, loop-state.json, scout_output.json) are dated 2026-06-03 (Friday). While expected for weekend digest, the system should explicitly flag pre-market data as stale when generating Saturday/Sunday digests to prevent misinterpretation as actionable signals for Monday’s open. Add a timestamp validation check in the digest generation logic to auto-append “DATA STALE: LAST TRADING DAY 2026-06-03” when current date > latest input date + 1 day.
